narrative:
Springfield L (precinct in Hamilton County) has 298 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 33.2 percentage points.
